Uses of Interface
org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.query.DeclaredQuery

Packages that use DeclaredQuery
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.aot
Ahead-of-Time (AOT) generation for Spring Data JPA repositories.
org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.query
Query implementation to execute queries against JPA.

    Description
    protected String
    AotRepositoryFragmentSupport.rewriteQuery(DeclaredQuery query, Sort sort, Class<?> returnedType)
    Rewrite a DeclaredQuery to apply Sort and Class projection.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    PreprocessedQuery
    A pre-parsed query implementing DeclaredQuery providing information about parameter bindings.
    Methods in org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.query that return DeclaredQuery
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @Nullable DeclaredQuery
    JpaQueryMethod.getDeclaredCountQuery()
    Returns the declared count query from a Query annotation or null if neither the annotation found nor the attribute was specified.
    DeclaredQuery
    JpaQueryMethod.getRequiredDeclaredQuery()
    Returns the required DeclaredQuery from a Query annotation or throws IllegalStateException if neither the annotation found nor the attribute was specified.
    static DeclaredQuery
    DeclaredQuery.jpqlQuery(String jpql)
    Creates a DeclaredQuery for a JPQL query.
    static DeclaredQuery
    DeclaredQuery.nativeQuery(String sql)
    Creates a DeclaredQuery for a native query.
    default DeclaredQuery
    DeclaredQuery.rewrite(String newQueryString)
    Rewrite a query string using a new query string retaining its source and native flag.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static EntityQuery
    EntityQuery.create(DeclaredQuery query, QueryEnhancerSelector selector)
    Create a new EntityQuery given DeclaredQuery and QueryEnhancerSelector.
    static QueryEnhancer
    QueryEnhancer.create(DeclaredQuery query)
    Creates a new QueryEnhancer for a DeclaredQuery.
    static QueryEnhancerFactory
    QueryEnhancerFactory.forQuery(DeclaredQuery query)
    Creates a new QueryEnhancerFactory for the given DeclaredQuery.
    static PreprocessedQuery
    PreprocessedQuery.parse(DeclaredQuery declaredQuery)
    Parse a query into its parametrized form by identifying anonymous, named, indexed and SpEL parameters.
    QueryEnhancerFactory
    QueryEnhancerSelector.DefaultQueryEnhancerSelector.select(DeclaredQuery query)
     
    QueryEnhancerFactory
    QueryEnhancerSelector.select(DeclaredQuery query)
    Select a QueryEnhancer for a query.
    boolean
    QueryEnhancerFactory.supports(DeclaredQuery query)
    Returns whether this QueryEnhancerFactory supports the given DeclaredQuery.
